Github commits (Jan 30 2023 at 04:11):

bdbcat pushed 10 commits to branch master.

  • plugin_{handler, loader}: Basic support to find plugin containing lib (38c8dd850bd)
  • Re-factor basic event machinery for bad libs/plugins (7b75ea7161b)
  • src, include: clang-format (f9b779d3f6c)
  • src: Remove executable permissions (43bdf115cd1)
  • Update comments, dead code, refactor dialog handling (fc0cd477e7c)
  • plugin_loader: clear list of errors after emitting in event. (f622dec51c4)
  • plugin_loader: check-load all plugins, also disabled (5f1922fa18f)
  • POTFILES: sort it. (7177b49da21)
  • load_errors: Use raw strings delimiter accepted by xgettext (b567663570b)
  • POTFILES. Add load_errors_dlg.cpp (c7cdd554c2b)
  • plugin_loader: handle empty load paths. (6c2a7b3823c)
  • flatpak: Fix correct ABI and wxwidgets version in local build (1d910d6955b)
  • plugin_handler: Limit scope of input file (eac2353aa92)
  • plugin_handler: logging: make installation paths debug messages (462bd63fd45)
  • Merge branch 'master' into unloadable-3011 (765d5620620)
  • Merge pull request #3024 from leamas/unloadable-3011 (85a84d10c4a)

Github commits (Jul 30 2023 at 20:11):

bdbcat pushed 43 commits to branch master. Commits by Alec Leamas (29), leamas (8), ALec Leamas (5) and others (1).

  • plugin_handler: Optionally return metadata in installPlugin (0c04f7c5ddd)
  • plugin_handler: Add some imported metadata mechanics (e34757af4c8)
  • catalog_parser: Add PluginMetadata.to_string(). (fcf71f0c141)
  • catalog-parser: Fix bug parsing api-version (6c986f1c07c)
  • Re-implement import-plugin, part 1 (c9d9ae4ee0a)
  • catalog_handler: Rewrite some odd, complicated code. (1f018bdb605)
  • plugin_handler: Add GetImportPaths() (e87a88a7cd9)
  • catalog_parser: Implement ParsePlugin(), refactor. (71c4c476327)
  • catalog_handler: Add imported plugins to catalog (adf9a06878d)
  • plugin_loader: some clean up (ce64bccea5e)
  • plugin_handler: uninstall: Remove import metadata (58c1e6db673)
  • Update used feedback in plugin list when importing (99d99caa93d)
  • pluginmanager: Remove dead code, fix __OCPN_ANDROID__, handle long lines..: (94f8084385f)
  • catalog_parser: Add an is_imported metadata attribute (9758f2a7c7e)
  • pluginmanager: Update version string handling + import suffix. (1f1d145bd9b)
  • plugin_handler et al: Ensure correct metadata on import. (ab2d0e31c45)
  • catalog_handler: Fix focal FTBFS (05f378e6bdf)
  • plugin_loader: Split PlugInContainer using a superclass (97ee3b929fb)
  • plugin_loader et al: Make references to plugin_array const and by value (3217ba0661b)
  • plugin_loader, plugin_handler et al. Restore GetInstalled() semantics (2e8f6394d8d)
    [and 23 more commit(s)]

Github commits (Dec 20 2023 at 04:51):

bdbcat pushed 30 commits to branch master. Commits by Alec Leamas (28), ALec Leamas (1) and bdbcat (1).

  • instance check -- make it a lazy init reference. (050f2482ed7)

  • flatpak: manifest: Run tests, add dbus talk permissions (70b479bc43a)

  • flatpak: manifest: Run some tests. (2ec7f349499)
  • dbus_server, tests: Add and use Disconnect() (6d680b839b7)

  • tests: Build tests also for MacOS (00b47c1ce2f)
  • ocpn_app: Don't build unusable CLI stuff on Android (e86566df05a)

  • Initial implementation of N2K Network, supporting Yacht Devices wired. (b452c7d6aa1)
  • Implement skeleton for multiple N2K/Ethernet data format support. (67164e76e3a)
  • Implement support of Actisense "N2K_ASCII" data format. (553c39a5ec1)
  • Implement support for "Actisense N2K" data format (bdad66fd50b)
  • Implement support of "Actisense RAW" format (20c309513e6)
  • Merge branch 'n2knet-2' (95c443eb6cb)

leamas pushed 18 commits to branch master. Commits by Alec Leamas (18).

  • libs: glu: Break dependendy on main (#3527) (d418c628b0a)
  • libs: texcmp: Break dependency on main (#3527) (eb78c383e66)
  • libs: mipmap: Partial break of deps on main (#3527) (e753b3c0d56)
  • geoprim: Break dependency on main opencpn (#3527) (a9aecf212e5)
  • Add new library for windows + android HL headers (83a7efbc025)
  • libs: libtess2: Remove deps on main (#3527) (6c45ef06c87)
  • libs: mipmap: Break deps on main (#3527) (ef76b627ab1)
  • libs: gtest: Remove deps on main (#3527) (1a64bcf9170)
  • build: Use libs/gl_headers in favour of buildwin/ and android/. (9d6c68fa5a1)
  • plugins: formalize references to java_vm et. al. (4c376285983)
  • tests: disable tests for 1.19+ in earlier versions (3201ece7075)

leamas pushed 23 commits to branch master. Commits by Alec Leamas (23).

  • Add new WaitContinue primitive (6f67f8ae7c9)

  • comm_drv_n0183_serial: Hook up new device events (a5c91349bae)

  • connections_dialog: Refactor loading of serial ports (96faeac6beb)
  • connections_dialog: Update serial ports list on change (bde8678a5cb)

  • connections_dialog: Kill those T() (930af6f7309)
  • Remove temporary test tools (5ab12d812c7)

Github commits (Feb 08 2024 at 11:55):

nohal pushed 12 commits to branch master.

  • Improve navobject file handling safety (f5156240498)
  • Initialize NavObjectChanges in the MyConfig constructor to prevent null pointer dereference at early shutdowm before MyConfig::LoadNavObjects was called (2fe7db1a88d)
  • Do not update or delete non-existent navobjects from navobj.xml.changes (26c08f60e9c)
  • Initialize variables in RoutePoint constructor (eb3970b055f)
  • Do not record layer routes as updates in navobj.xml.changes on visibility change (8e707964948)
  • Replace the broken route/track event-based deletion logic while replaying navobj.xml.changes (94bb627c310)
  • Fix memory leak (0fce78c3737)
  • Fix memory leak (5a5e65471bc)
  • Fix memory leak (15f7a82c279)
  • Update the bundled pugixml library to 1.14 (0102541d821)
  • Try harder to use backups in case of navobj.xml is missing or can't be loaded as XML (8c8f2dbadeb)
  • Merge pull request #3585 from nohal/navobj_safety (621bac18ad0)

bdbcat pushed 4 commits to branch master.

  • Use a sensible chart scale rounding logic to aggregate iso-scale charts. (2d4f374072a)
  • As a test, show some of the chart files names in composite chart groupings. (1836d3620e6)
  • Reduce complexity, and so improve performance of chart hilite algorithm. (40ef7f965d3)
  • Merge branch 'master' of github.com:OpenCPN/OpenCPN (db4b1e9128f)

Github commits (Feb 25 2024 at 02:06):

nohal pushed 1 commit to branch master.

  • Disable mesa_glthread on Linux. Closes #2889 (d40a5645064)

Github commits (Feb 26 2024 at 03:45):

bdbcat pushed 6 commits to branch master.

  • Streamline Settings UX when adding chart directory, then immediately adding that dir to a group. (0ff84012e84)
  • Improve AIS Alert sound option UX. (2d898614a2b)
  • Add settings option for extended composite chartbar key information. (8439b8560cf)
  • Improve UX on zoom in on new chart quilt after group switch. (46519659768)
  • Correct chart bar re-composition on chart group change. (1b28db92d0a)
  • Improve UX when panning immediately after chart group change. (f8048b8b79d)
